name: Chocolate Chip Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Vanilla wafer crumbs (about 30 wafers; crushed)
3 packages Cream cheese (8 oz. each); softened
Chocolate leaves: Thoroughly wash and dry several non-toxic leaves.
In a small microwave-safe bowl, place Hershey's mini semi-sweet chocolate chips. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 30 to 45 seconds or until smooth when stirred.
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chocolate cookie crust by heating the oven to 350°F (175°C). In a medium bowl, stir together vanilla wafer crumbs, Hershey's cocoa, powdered sugar, and melted butter or margarine. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom and up the side of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 8 minutes and cool slightly.
2. Prepare the cheesecake filling by combining softened cream cheese, sugar, flour, pumpkin pie spice, and eggs in a large mixing bowl until well blended. Stir in the mini semi-sweet chocolate chips. Pour the batter into the prepared crust.
3. Place the cheesecake in the oven and bake for 10 minutes at 250°F (120°C). Continue baking for an additional 50 minutes or until set.
4. Remove the cheesecake from the oven and let it cool completely on a wire rack. Loosen the cake from the side of the pan with a knife, then cool completely before removing the side of the pan.
5. Refrigerate the cheesecake for at least 2 hours before serving. Garnish with chocolate leaves if desired. Cover any leftover cheesecake and refrigerate.
Serve 10 to 12 servings.
